scripts.build: node -e "import('node:child_process').then(({ spawnSync }) => { const env = { ...process.env, NODE_OPTIONS: '' }; for (const cmd of ['vue-tsc --noEmit', 'vite build']) { const result = spawnSync(cmd, { shell: true, stdio: 'inherit', env }); if (result.status) process.exit(result.status); } })"
scripts.test: node -e "import('node:child_process').then(({ spawnSync }) => { const env = { ...process.env, NODE_OPTIONS: '' }; const result = spawnSync('vitest', ['run'], { shell: true, stdio: 'inherit', env }); process.exit(result.status || 0); })"
scripts.test:watch: node -e "import('node:child_process').then(({ spawnSync }) => { const env = { ...process.env, NODE_OPTIONS: '' }; const result = spawnSync('vitest', [], { shell: true, stdio: 'inherit', env }); process.exit(result.status || 0); })"
